summary: Frontend testing of CSV table bug fixes: 1) Rating column decimal formatting, 2) Sortable column headers. Both bugs verified as FIXED on Admin Dashboard and LeadFinder pages. Rating values now display with max 1 decimal (e.g., 5.0 instead of 5.0000000). Column headers are clickable and sort data correctly with chevron indicators.

critical_code_review_comments: formatRating() function correctly parses and formats ratings to 1 decimal using parseFloat().toFixed(1)
toggleCsvSort() function correctly toggles sort direction when clicking same column twice
sortedCsv/sortedCsvLeads correctly sorts by column with proper direction handling
Sortable column headers have data-testid='csv-header-{key}' for testing
ChevronUp/ChevronDown icons correctly show on active sort column only
Both AdminDashboard.jsx and LeadFinderPage.jsx share same CSV import/sort implementation

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Rating column shows too many decimals (e.g., 5.0000000 instead of 5.0)
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Imported CSV with ratings like 5.0000000, 4.3000000 - displayed as 5.0, 4.3

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: CSV table columns need to be sortable by clicking on headers
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Clicked Plaats, Rating, Website headers - all sort correctly with chevron indicators

seed_data_creation: Created /tmp/test_sort.csv with 6 rows containing varied ratings (5.0000000, 4.3000000, 3.7500000, 4.8000000, 4.1000000, 4.9000000) and mixed website presence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36: Verified CSV table bug fixes. Key findings: 1) formatRating() at line ~177 in AdminDashboard.jsx and ~603 in LeadFinderPage.jsx correctly formats ratings to 1 decimal, 2) toggleCsvSort() at line ~181/~608 handles sort direction toggle, 3) sortedCsv/sortedCsvLeads at line ~187/~614 implements sorting logic, 4) Table headers have data-testid='csv-header-{key}' where key is: naam, categorie, plaats, website, telefoon, rating, reviews, status, whatsapp, delete. 5) Both pages share localStorage key 'csv_imported_leads' for CSV data persistence.
